text:
<invoke name="Bash">
  <parameter name="description" xml="true">Verify .omc is fully untracked</parameter>
  <parameter name="command" xml="true">cd /root/xylocopa-projects/idledo && git ls-files .omc/ 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; git diff --stat .gitignore</parameter>
</invoke>
现在进入 Phase 4 验证和 Phase 5 清理。

<tool_calls>
  <invoke name="Skill">
    <parameter name="skill"><![CDATA[cancel]]></parameter>
    <parameter name="args"><![CDATA[autopilot complete — 4 warlock skill effects implemented, all tests pass]]></parameter>
  </invoke>
</tool_calls>
